from_hex.doc: decodes a hexadecimal string into raw bytes.

to_hex.doc: encodes raw bytes as a hexadecimal string.

bytes_equal.doc: reports whether two byte slices are equal.

tree_hash_atom.doc: computes the CLVM tree hash of an atom (leaf node): SHA-256 of 0x01 prepended to the atom bytes.

tree_hash_pair.doc: computes the CLVM tree hash of a cons pair: SHA-256 of 0x02 prepended to the concatenation of the two child hashes.

sha256.doc: computes the SHA-256 hash of the given bytes.

curry_tree_hash.doc: computes the tree hash of a curried program without materializing the full CLVM tree.

generate_bytes.doc: generates cryptographically random bytes of the specified length.

select_coins.doc: selects the smallest set of coins that meets or exceeds the target amount using a knapsack algorithm.

spend_bundle_cost.doc: computes the total CLVM execution cost of the given coin spends.
